body.title: Register AnnounceBroker as Skeleton sub-device + bootstrap announce/announce-events mailboxes + IMAP listener
body.result: Skeleton bootstraps announce + announce-events mailboxes, registers AnnounceBroker, runs AnnounceListener.pump() to dispatch envelopes→manifests over IMAP. Errors publish structured kind=error. listener.py NEW. 10 new tests; 144 passed. agent_datacenter commit 27f5e5b.
body.description:
Slice 1 shipped AnnounceBroker as standalone in-process. Slice 2 wires it into Skeleton: register as a sub-device, create comms://announce + comms://announce-events IMAP mailboxes at skeleton init, run an IDLE listener that pulls envelopes from comms://announce, calls broker.resolve_announce(), and publishes Manifest to comms://announce-events. Broker still pure (resolve_announce unchanged from slice 1) — this ticket adds the AnnounceListener wrapper that loops on the bus.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/skeleton/skeleton.py (init wires AnnounceBroker + AnnounceListener), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/listener.py (NEW — IMAP IDLE loop, envelope→manifest dispatch), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/__init__.py (export AnnounceListener), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/bus/imap_server.py (bootstrap announce + announce-events mailboxes if missing — extend create_default_mailboxes or equivalent)
**Design rules:** broker stays pure (no IO inside resolve_announce); listener owns the IDLE loop; envelope deserialization errors publish a structured error to announce-events, not silent drop
**Scope boundary:** in — broker registered as Skeleton sub-device, mailboxes bootstrapped at skeleton init, listener loop dispatches envelopes to manifests over IMAP. Out — inotify-based invalidation (slice 3), CC-side announce_mcp.py adapter (slice 3), profile inheritance (slice 5), authentication/proof verification.
**Test plan:** Extend test_skeleton.py — boot Skeleton with broker, verify comms://announce + comms://announce-events mailboxes exist on the IMAP stub after init. New test_announce_listener.py — listener consumes a posted envelope, calls broker.resolve_announce, publishes manifest to announce-events; malformed-envelope branch publishes error message rather than crashing the listener.
